case_title: WEST HOTEL,L.P.A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. MARJORIE ROSE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST HOTEL,L.P.A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, MARJORIE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
